name: Chicken Scaloppine with Oregano (Italy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently flatten the chicken breasts with a meat mallet until about 0.5 cm thick.
2. Dust the flattened chicken with flour, coating evenly and tapping off any excess.
3. In a large frying pan over medium heat, melt butter with oil.
4. Add the chicken breasts to the pan and cook, turning once, until golden on each side for about 3 minutes.
5. Sprinkle oregano over the chicken, season to taste with salt and pepper, and pour in the wine.
6. Cook until most of the wine evaporates, leaving a little cooking juice, for about 2 minutes.
7. Transfer the chicken to a warmed platter and serve immediately.
